appDescription.message: Turn selected web text into an editable civic report.

tagline.message: From web noise to a useful civic report.

sourcePlaceholder.message: Select text on a page, right-click and choose “Analyze with CivicAI”.

privacyNote.message: CivicAI does not publish or send anything automatically. Always review the text before using it.

textTooShort.message: Select or enter a more complete text.

notCivic.message: The text does not appear to describe a civic issue.

analysisComplete.message: Analysis complete. Review and edit the fields before use.

localEngineError.message: The local AI engine could not complete the analysis: $1

demoText.message: For three weeks, the streetlight in front of the school on Manzoni Street has been out. At night the sidewalk is completely dark and several people have nearly fallen.
